rationale: Builds on the projection-sensitive int8 win by keeping late quant-aware roundtrips focused on projection matrices, where the current best quantizer is already most specialized. That removes repeated endgame noise from qkv/fc weights while increasing quant-aware snap frequency and allowing the projection ramp to actually reach exact roundtrip before the final save.
title: Projection-Only Quant-Aware Endgame Densification
